title: 10cm Plush Gingerbread Man Soft Toy With Red Bow - Christmas Soft Toys - Christmas Decorations
features: Gift your child this cute plush gingerbread man with polka dot bow or use as a festive hanging decoration for your tree.
This plush toy measures at 10cm (4") tall which is perfect for taking on the go.
4 assorted colours available: red, pink, blue and green (see pictures and title for chosen colour).
Each plush toy comes with a string loop for easy hanging on your Christmas tree or around your home.
